words.def: a journey in a vehicle (usually an automobile)
words.zh: n. 騎馬, 乘坐, 乘車, 搭便車
vt. 免除, 以...清除, 使獲自由, 使擺脫

words.def: a small cube with 1 to 6 spots on the six faces; used in gambling to generate random numbers
words.zh: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄滅, 漠然, 渴望

words.def: red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood
words.zh: a. 紅的, 紅色的, 紅腫的, 流血的
